description: Sample Hindi-English code-mixed sentences for testing and evaluation

samples.text: yaar ye movie bahut amazing thi
kya bakwas movie thi, waste of time
kal exam hai aur mujhe kuch nahi aata
bhai party mein bahut maza aaya, awesome food tha
aaj ka weather bahut pleasant hai, perfect for outing
ye new phone ka camera quality ekdum shandar hai
traffic itna horrible hai ki office late pahunch gaya
mera result aa gaya, bahut khushi hui all subjects clear
is restaurant ka service ekdum pathetic hai never coming back
coding seekh raha hoon, Python bahut interesting language hai
aaj bohot thak gaya office mein bahut kaam tha
mere dost ki shaadi mein gaya tha, function bahut grand tha
